---
title: "SBA 7(a) Loan Data — Exploratory Analysis"
author: "Colin McBane"
date: today
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# SBA 7(a) Loan Data — Exploratory Analysis

## Overview

This report analyzes raw SBA 7(a) federal loan data cleaned in Phase 1.
The goal is to understand the distribution of loan characteristics,
identify default patterns, and inform feature selection for Phase 4 modeling.

```{r setup}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(ggplot2)
library(corrplot)
library(scales)

# Connect to SQLite database built in Phase 1
conn <- dbConnect(
  RSQLite::SQLite(),
  "data/processed/sba_clean.db"
)

# Load the clean loans view into R
loans <- dbGetQuery(conn, "SELECT * FROM loans_clean")

# Quick sanity check
cat("Rows loaded:", nrow(loans), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(loans), "\n")
cat("Default rate:", round(mean(loans$is_default) * 100, 2), "%\n")
```
